title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
